articles.title: West Ham relegation may cost London taxpayers £2.5m
articles.summary: London taxpayers may have to pay an extra £2.5m if West Ham are relegated from the Premier League, because of the club's lease agreement for London Stadium.

articles.title: No Celtic future talks before cup final for O'Neill
articles.summary: Martin O'Neill does not expect there to be discussion about the Celtic manager's position before Saturday's Scottish Cup final, and doubts he would "have the energy" to continue.

articles.title: How overperforming Villa returned to Champions League
articles.summary: Eight places better off than their expected position, Aston Villa are the highest overperforming team in the Premier League.

articles.summary: Chelsea have appointed former Liverpool midfielder Xabi Alonso as their manager on a four‑year contract.

articles.title: Ref Watch: Why Man Utd goal should have been disallowed
articles.summary: Ex-Premier League referee Dermot Gallagher says Manchester United's second goal during their 3-2 win over Nottingham Forest should have been disallowed after a Bryan Mbeumo handball.

articles.title: 'I was screaming' - footballer stabbed seven times recalls mass knife attack
articles.summary: Footballer Jonathan Gjoshe was among the 11 passengers seriously injured in a knife attack on a train as it travelled through Cambridgeshire last November.

articles.title: Osula stars as Newcastle increase West Ham's relegation worries
articles.summary: William Osula scores twice as Newcastle soundly defeat West Ham United 3-1, to leave Nuno Espirito Santo's side on the brink of relegation from the Premier League.

articles.title: Fernandes equals assist record as Man Utd beat Forest
articles.summary: Bruno Fernandes earns his 20th Premier League assist of the season, equalling the record set by Kevin De Bruyne and Thierry Henry, as Manchester United defeat Nottingham Forest 3-2 in their final home...

articles.title: Sunderland keep Europe hopes alive with win at Everton
articles.summary: Sunderland come from behind to defeat Everton 3-1 at the Hill Dickinson Stadium, moving up to ninth in the Premier League.

articles.title: Should Cunha's goal have been disallowed?

articles.title: Outtara double rescues home draw for Brentford against Palace
articles.summary: Dango Outtara scores twice to earn Brentford a 2-2 draw at home to Crystal Palace in the Premier League, as Keith Andrews' side stay in the hunt for European football.

articles.title: Northampton Town appoint Hogg as manager
articles.summary: Northampton Town appoint former Norwich City assistant head coach Chris Hogg as their manager on a two-year contract.

articles.title: Van Rensburg named in England training camp ahead of Nations Championship
articles.summary: Benhard Janse van Rensburg, Charlie Bracken and Archie McParland have all been named in England's training camp ahead of the inaugural Nations Championship.

articles.title: Tipped for relegation to title winners - AGF's 'King Arthur' moment
articles.summary: Aarhus GF were tipped for relegation from the Danish Superliga this season. Instead, they will lift the championship trophy for the first time in 40 years this Sunday.
